# в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ

 === SECTION 1: CLAIMS DISCIPLINE [INTERNAL_ONLY] ===
## HOW WE THINK ABOUT SYMPTOMS

**We don't just treat symptoms вҖ” we investigate root causes.**

When you come with a concern, we:
1. Listen to your full story
2. Consider multiple possible causes
3. Test systematically
4. Treat what we find
5. Follow up and adjust

**The same symptom can have many causes.** Our job is to find YOUR cause.

---

## COMMON PRESENTATIONS WE INVESTIGATE

### Fatigue

**Fatigue has dozens of potential causes:**
- Thyroid dysfunction
- Anemia/Iron deficiency
- Sleep disorders
- Adrenal dysfunction
- Blood sugar issues
- Chronic infections
- Mitochondrial issues
- Depression
- Toxin exposure
- Nutrient deficiencies
- And more...

**We test systematically to identify YOUR cause.**

### Brain Fog

**Cognitive issues can stem from:**
- Sleep problems
- Blood sugar instability
- Thyroid issues
- Hormonal changes
- Gut dysfunction
- Inflammation
- Toxins (mold, metals)
- Nutrient deficiencies
- Chronic infections

### Digestive Issues

**Gut symptoms require investigating:**
- Stomach acid status
- Enzyme function
- Microbiome balance
- Infections/Dysbiosis
- Food sensitivities
- Structural issues
- Nervous system state
- Inflammation

### Hormonal Concerns

**Hormone imbalances connect to:**
- Thyroid function
- Adrenal health
- Sex hormone balance
- Blood sugar/Insulin
- Gut health
- Toxin exposure
- Nutrient status
- Stress levels

---

 === SECTION 2: PATIENT COMMUNICATION [PATIENT_OK] ===
## FATIGUE DECISION TREE

```
CHIEF COMPLAINT: FATIGUE

TIER 1 ASSESSMENT
в”ңв”Җв”Җ CBC (anemia, infection)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ CMP (metabolic, liver, kidney)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ TSH, Free T4, Free T3 (thyroid)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Ferritin (iron stores) вҖ” Target >50
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Vitamin D (deficiency common)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Vitamin B12 (deficiency common)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Fasting glucose and insulin (metabolic)
в””в”Җв”Җ Basic history and physical

    в”Ӯ
    в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җ FINDINGS? в”Җв”Җв”Җ YES в”Җв”ҖвҶ’ Address findings
    в”Ӯ                          вҖў Hypothyroid вҶ’ Thyroid protocol
    в”Ӯ                          вҖў Anemia вҶ’ Iron/B12/workup
    в”Ӯ                          вҖў Metabolic вҶ’ Metabolic protocol
    в”Ӯ
    в””в”Җв”Җв”Җ NO FINDINGS OR PARTIAL RESPONSE
         в”Ӯ
         в–ј
TIER 2 ASSESSMENT
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Full thyroid panel (RT3, antibodies)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Cortisol pattern (DUTCH or salivary)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ DHEA-S
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Full iron panel
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Homocysteine
в”ңв”Җв”Җ RBC Magnesium
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Sleep assessment (apnea screening)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Detailed history (stress, infections)
в””в”Җв”Җ Consider hormone panel

    в”Ӯ
    в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җ FINDINGS? в”Җв”Җв”Җ YES в”Җв”ҖвҶ’ Address findings
    в”Ӯ                          вҖў HPA dysfunction вҶ’ HPA protocol
    в”Ӯ                          вҖў Poor T4вҶ’T3 conversion вҶ’ T3/NDT
    в”Ӯ                          вҖў Sleep apnea вҶ’ Treatment
    в”Ӯ
    в””в”Җв”Җв”Җ NO FINDINGS OR PARTIAL RESPONSE
         в”Ӯ
         в–ј
TIER 3 ASSESSMENT
в”ңв”Җв”Җ GI-MAP (gut dysfunction)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ OAT (organic acids - mitochondria, yeast)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Mycotoxins (mold exposure)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Chronic infection workup (EBV, Lyme)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Heavy metals
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Consider CIRS workup
в””в”Җв”Җ Consider mitochondrial support trial

    в”Ӯ
    в–ј
INTEGRATE FINDINGS AND TREAT
```

## BRAIN FOG DECISION TREE

```
CHIEF COMPLAINT: BRAIN FOG / COGNITIVE ISSUES

TIER 1 ASSESSMENT
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Sleep quality assessment
в”ңв”Җв”Җ TSH, Free T4, Free T3
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Fasting glucose, HbA1c, insulin
в”ңв”Җв”Җ CBC, CMP
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Vitamin D, B12, folate
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Homocysteine
в””в”Җв”Җ Depression/anxiety screening

    в”Ӯ
    в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җ FINDINGS? в”Җв”Җв”Җ YES в”Җв”ҖвҶ’ Address findings
    в”Ӯ                          вҖў Sleep disorder вҶ’ Sleep protocol
    в”Ӯ                          вҖў Thyroid вҶ’ Thyroid protocol
    в”Ӯ                          вҖў Metabolic вҶ’ Blood sugar stability
    в”Ӯ                          вҖў B12/Folate вҶ’ Supplementation
    в”Ӯ
    в””в”Җв”Җв”Җ NO FINDINGS OR PARTIAL RESPONSE
         в”Ӯ
         в–ј
TIER 2 ASSESSMENT
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Full thyroid panel (RT3, antibodies)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Hormone panel (testosterone, estrogen)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Cortisol pattern
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Omega-3 index
в”ңв”Җв”Җ hs-CRP (inflammation)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ ApoE genotype (if long-term concern)
в””в”Җв”Җ Detailed exposure history (mold, toxins)

    в”Ӯ
    в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җ FINDINGS? в”Җв”Җв”Җ YES в”Җв”ҖвҶ’ Address findings
    в”Ӯ                          вҖў Inflammation вҶ’ Anti-inflammatory protocol
    в”Ӯ                          вҖў Hormones вҶ’ Hormone optimization
    в”Ӯ                          вҖў Cortisol вҶ’ HPA protocol
    в”Ӯ
    в””в”Җв”Җв”Җ NO FINDINGS OR PARTIAL RESPONSE
         в”Ӯ
         в–ј
TIER 3 ASSESSMENT
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Mycotoxin testing
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Heavy metals
в”ңв”Җв”Җ GI-MAP (gut-brain axis)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Chronic infection panel (Lyme, EBV)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ MRI if indicated
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Consider neuropsych testing
в””в”Җв”Җ Consider CIRS workup

    в”Ӯ
    в–ј
INTEGRATE AND TREAT
вҖў Consider cognitive support protocol
вҖў Lion's Mane, Omega-3, NAD+
вҖў Address all contributing factors
```

## GI SYMPTOMS DECISION TREE

```
CHIEF COMPLAINT: DIGESTIVE ISSUES (Bloating, Pain, Altered Bowel)

INITIAL STRATIFICATION
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Red flags? (Blood, weight loss, >50, family history)
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ YES вҶ’ Refer for conventional workup first
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җ IBS-pattern (Rome criteria)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Upper vs. Lower predominant
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Bloating-predominant
в””в”Җв”Җ Constipation vs. Diarrhea vs. Mixed

    в”Ӯ
    в–ј
TIER 1 ASSESSMENT
в”ңв”Җв”Җ CBC, CMP
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Celiac panel (TTG-IgA, total IgA)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Thyroid panel
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Inflammatory markers (CRP, calprotectin if indicated)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Diet and symptom diary
в””в”Җв”Җ Trial elimination of common triggers (gluten, dairy)

    в”Ӯ
    в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җ FINDINGS? в”Җв”Җв”Җ YES в”Җв”ҖвҶ’ Address findings
    в”Ӯ
    в”Ӯ   GLUTEN ROUTING (v5.8 вҖ” query 67_GLUTEN_CELIAC_NCGS):
    в”Ӯ   в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
    в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ Patient reacts to gluten / "gluten sensitive"            в”Ӯ
    в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   вҶ’ Load 67_GLUTEN_CELIAC_NCGS for full differential    в”Ӯ
    в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ                                                          в”Ӯ
    в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ tTG-IgA POSITIVE вҶ’ probable celiac вҶ’ refer gastro       в”Ӯ
    в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   + Start GF + malabsorption repletion (see В§3 of 67)   в”Ӯ
    в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ                                                          в”Ӯ
    в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ tTG-IgA NEGATIVE вҶ’ NCGS likely (majority of patients)   в”Ӯ
    в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   вҶ’ 5R protocol + gut repair вҶ’ reintroduction possible  в”Ӯ
    в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   вҶ’ See NCGS Resolution Protocol В§4 of 67               в”Ӯ
    в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ                                                          в”Ӯ
    в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ Immediate IgE reaction вҶ’ wheat allergy вҶ’ allergist       в”Ӯ
    в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
    в”Ӯ
    в”Ӯ                          вҖў Thyroid вҶ’ Treat
    в”Ӯ                          вҖў Clear food trigger вҶ’ Eliminate
    в”Ӯ
    в””в”Җв”Җв”Җ NO FINDINGS OR PARTIAL RESPONSE
         в”Ӯ
         в–ј
TIER 2 ASSESSMENT
в”ңв”Җв”Җ GI-MAP (comprehensive stool analysis)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ SIBO breath test (if bloating dominant)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Full elimination diet
в””в”Җв”Җ Assess stress/nervous system component

    в”Ӯ
    в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җ FINDINGS? в”Җв”Җв”Җ YES в”Җв”ҖвҶ’ Address findings
    в”Ӯ                          вҖў SIBO вҶ’ SIBO protocol
    в”Ӯ                          вҖў Dysbiosis вҶ’ Gut protocol
    в”Ӯ                          вҖў Pathogens вҶ’ Treat
    в”Ӯ                          вҖў Food sensitivities вҶ’ Elimination
    в”Ӯ                          вҖў Stress вҶ’ Gut-brain protocol
    в”Ӯ
    в””в”Җв”Җв”Җ PERSISTENT SYMPTOMS
         в”Ӯ
         в–ј
TIER 3 ASSESSMENT
в”ңв”Җв”Җ OAT (yeast markers, oxalates)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ H. pylori testing if not done
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Consider motility testing
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Consider structural evaluation
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Consider histamine/MCAS workup
в””в”Җв”Җ Consider nervous system protocols (DNRS)

    в”Ӯ
    в–ј
COMPREHENSIVE GUT PROTOCOL
вҖў 5R Framework: Remove, Replace, Reinoculate, Repair, Rebalance
вҖў See 12_GUT for detailed protocols
```

## WEIGHT RESISTANCE DECISION TREE

```
CHIEF COMPLAINT: DIFFICULTY LOSING WEIGHT / STUBBORN WEIGHT

TIER 1 ASSESSMENT
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Detailed diet and activity history
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Fasting glucose, insulin, HbA1c, HOMA-IR
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Full thyroid panel
в”ңв”Җв”Җ CBC, CMP
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Lipid panel with TG/HDL ratio
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Medication review
в””в”Җв”Җ Sleep assessment

    в”Ӯ
    в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җ FINDINGS? в”Җв”Җв”Җ YES в”Җв”ҖвҶ’ Address findings
    в”Ӯ                          вҖў Insulin resistance вҶ’ Metabolic protocol
    в”Ӯ                          вҖў Hypothyroid вҶ’ Thyroid optimization
    в”Ӯ                          вҖў Medications вҶ’ Discuss alternatives
    в”Ӯ                          вҖў Sleep issues вҶ’ Sleep protocol
    в”Ӯ
    в””в”Җв”Җв”Җ NO FINDINGS OR PARTIAL RESPONSE
         в”Ӯ
         в–ј
TIER 2 ASSESSMENT
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Cortisol pattern (DUTCH)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Full hormone panel
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ Women: Estrogen, progesterone, testosterone, DHEA-S
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ Men: Total T, Free T, SHBG, estradiol
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Leptin level
в”ңв”Җв”Җ hs-CRP (inflammation)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Consider GI-MAP
в””в”Җв”Җ Consider DUTCH complete

    в”Ӯ
    в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җ FINDINGS? в”Җв”Җв”Җ YES в”Җв”ҖвҶ’ Address findings
    в”Ӯ                          вҖў High cortisol вҶ’ HPA protocol
    в”Ӯ                          вҖў Low testosterone вҶ’ Hormone optimization
    в”Ӯ                          вҖў Estrogen dominance вҶ’ DIM, detox support
    в”Ӯ                          вҖў Inflammation вҶ’ Anti-inflammatory protocol
    в”Ӯ                          вҖў Gut issues вҶ’ Gut protocol
    в”Ӯ
    в””в”Җв”Җв”Җ STILL RESISTANT
         в”Ӯ
         в–ј
TIER 3 ASSESSMENT
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Mycotoxin testing (mold disrupts metabolism)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Heavy metals
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Leptin/Adiponectin ratio
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Consider RMR testing (metabolic adaptation)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Consider limbic system component
в””в”Җв”Җ Reevaluate all factors

    в”Ӯ
    в–ј
COMPREHENSIVE APPROACH
вҖў Reverse metabolic adaptation if present
вҖў Consider extended fasting protocols (supervised)
вҖў Address toxin burden
вҖў Consider GLP-1 agonists if appropriate
вҖў See 29_WEIGHT_BODY_COMP
```

## HORMONE IMBALANCE DECISION TREE (WOMEN)

```
CHIEF COMPLAINT: HORMONAL SYMPTOMS (Irregular cycles, PMS, 
                 Perimenopause, Menopause)

INITIAL STRATIFICATION
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Reproductive age (cycling)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Perimenopausal (irregular)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Postmenopausal
в””в”Җв”Җ PCOS features?

    в”Ӯ
    в–ј
TIER 1 ASSESSMENT
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Day 3: FSH, LH, Estradiol
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Day 21: Progesterone
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Any day: TSH, Free T4, Free T3
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Testosterone, Free T, SHBG
в”ңв”Җв”Җ DHEA-S
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Fasting glucose, insulin
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Consider: Prolactin, AMH (if fertility concern)
в””в”Җв”Җ Detailed menstrual history

    в”Ӯ
    в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җ PCOS PATTERN? в”Җв”ҖвҶ’ PCOS Protocol (See 18_FEMALE)
    в”Ӯ    (High androgens, irregular cycles, polycystic ovaries)
    в”Ӯ
    в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җ PERIMENOPAUSE? в”Җв”ҖвҶ’ 
    в”Ӯ    вҖў Support transition
    в”Ӯ    вҖў Consider HRT if symptomatic
    в”Ӯ    вҖў Adaptogen support
    в”Ӯ
    в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җ ESTROGEN DOMINANCE? в”Җв”ҖвҶ’
    в”Ӯ    (High E:P ratio, symptoms)
    в”Ӯ    вҖў DIM/I3C
    в”Ӯ    вҖў Support detox
    в”Ӯ    вҖў Consider progesterone
    в”Ӯ
    в””в”Җв”Җв”Җ OTHER PATTERNS в”Җв”ҖвҶ’ Address specific findings

         в”Ӯ
         в–ј
TIER 2 ASSESSMENT (If needed)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ DUTCH Complete
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ Hormone levels
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ Cortisol pattern
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ Estrogen metabolites
в”ңв”Җв”Җ GI-MAP (gut affects hormones)
в””в”Җв”Җ Advanced thyroid if indicated

    в”Ӯ
    в–ј
COMPREHENSIVE HORMONE PROTOCOL
вҖў See 18_FEMALE for detailed protocols
```

## LOW TESTOSTERONE DECISION TREE (MEN)

```
CHIEF COMPLAINT: LOW T SYMPTOMS (Fatigue, low libido, 
                 poor recovery, mood)

TIER 1 ASSESSMENT
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Total Testosterone (AM, fasting)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Free Testosterone
в”ңв”Җв”Җ SHBG
в”ңв”Җв”Җ LH, FSH
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Estradiol (sensitive)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ CBC, CMP
в”ңв”Җв”Җ TSH, Free T4, Free T3
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Fasting glucose, insulin
в””в”Җв”Җ Prolactin (if T very low)

    в”Ӯ
    в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җ PRIMARY HYPOGONADISM
    в”Ӯ    (Low T, High LH/FSH)
    в”Ӯ    в””в”Җв”Җ Testicular issue вҶ’ Evaluate, likely TRT candidate
    в”Ӯ
    в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җ SECONDARY HYPOGONADISM
    в”Ӯ    (Low T, Low/Normal LH/FSH)
    в”Ӯ    в””в”Җв”Җ Pituitary/Hypothalamic вҶ’ Evaluate causes
    в”Ӯ        вҖў Stress/HPA вҶ’ Address
    в”Ӯ        вҖў Sleep apnea вҶ’ Treat
    в”Ӯ        вҖў Obesity вҶ’ Weight loss
    в”Ӯ        вҖў Medications вҶ’ Review
    в”Ӯ        вҖў Pituitary issue вҶ’ MRI if indicated
    в”Ӯ
    в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җ HIGH SHBG (Low Free T despite OK Total)
    в”Ӯ    в””в”Җв”Җ Address causes: Thyroid, liver, aging
    в”Ӯ
    в””в”Җв”Җв”Җ BORDERLINE/NORMAL BUT SYMPTOMATIC
         в”Ӯ
         в–ј
TIER 2 ASSESSMENT
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Cortisol pattern (DUTCH)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Full thyroid panel
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Sleep study if apnea suspected
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Lifestyle assessment
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ Sleep quality
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ Exercise type and intensity
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ Diet and body composition
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ Stress levels
в””в”Җв”Җ DHEA-S, Pregnenolone

    в”Ӯ
    в–ј
INTERVENTION HIERARCHY
1. Optimize lifestyle (sleep, exercise, weight, stress)
2. Address findings (thyroid, cortisol, sleep apnea)
3. Support naturally (zinc, D, DHEA, adaptogens)
4. Consider peptides (Ipamorelin/CJC for GH support)
5. TRT if indicated and lifestyle optimized

вҖў See 17_MALE for detailed protocols
```

## AUTOIMMUNE PATTERN DECISION TREE

```
CHIEF COMPLAINT: SUSPECTED AUTOIMMUNE
                 (Multiple symptoms, family history, positive ANA)

TIER 1 ASSESSMENT
в”ңв”Җв”Җ ANA with reflex
в”ңв”Җв”Җ CBC, CMP
в”ңв”Җв”Җ ESR, hs-CRP
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Full thyroid panel + TPO, TG antibodies
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Vitamin D
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Comprehensive history
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ Symptom timeline
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ Family history
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ Triggers (infections, stress, exposures)
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ GI history
в””в”Җв”Җ Celiac panel

    в”Ӯ
    в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җ SPECIFIC AUTOIMMUNE IDENTIFIED
    в”Ӯ    в””в”Җв”Җ Collaborate with rheumatology
    в”Ӯ        + Functional support protocol
    в”Ӯ
    в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җ HASHIMOTO'S (High TPO/TG)
    в”Ӯ    в””в”Җв”Җ See 22_AUTOIMMUNE thyroid protocol
    в”Ӯ
    в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җ POSITIVE ANA WITHOUT SPECIFIC DISEASE
    в”Ӯ    в””в”Җв”Җ Monitor + Address root causes
    в”Ӯ
    в””в”Җв”Җв”Җ SYMPTOMS BUT SERONEGATIVE
         в”Ӯ
         в–ј
TIER 2 ASSESSMENT
в”ңв”Җв”Җ GI-MAP (gut-immune connection)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Zonulin (intestinal permeability)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Food sensitivity assessment
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Detailed toxic exposure history
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Chronic infection panel (EBV often elevated)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Mycotoxin testing
в””в”Җв”Җ Consider AIP elimination diet trial

    в”Ӯ
    в–ј
COMPREHENSIVE AUTOIMMUNE PROTOCOL
вҖў Remove triggers (food, toxins, infections)
вҖў Heal gut (central to autoimmunity)
вҖў Reduce inflammation
вҖў Support immune balance
вҖў Consider LDN

вҖў See 22_AUTOIMMUNE for detailed protocols
```

---

 === SECTION 3: PHARMACOKINETICS & DYNAMICS (ADME) [INTERNAL_ONLY] ===
## FATIGUE WORKUP

**Tier 1:** CBC, CMP, TSH/FT4/FT3, Ferritin, D, B12, Glucose/Insulin
**Tier 2:** Full thyroid, Cortisol, DHEA-S, Sleep study
**Tier 3:** GI-MAP, OAT, Mycotoxins, Lyme panel

## BRAIN FOG WORKUP

**Tier 1:** Sleep assessment, Thyroid, Glucose/Insulin, B12, Homocysteine
**Tier 2:** Full thyroid, Hormones, Cortisol, Inflammation
**Tier 3:** Mycotoxins, Heavy metals, Infections, GI-MAP

## GI WORKUP

**Tier 1:** Celiac, Thyroid, Trial elimination
**Tier 2:** GI-MAP, SIBO breath test, Full elimination
**Tier 3:** OAT, Motility, MCAS workup

## WEIGHT RESISTANCE WORKUP

**Tier 1:** Insulin/Glucose, Thyroid, Meds, Sleep
**Tier 2:** Cortisol, Hormones, Leptin, Inflammation, Gut
**Tier 3:** Mycotoxins, Heavy metals, RMR testing

## HYPERTENSION DECISION TREE

```
ELEVATED BLOOD PRESSURE (вүҘ130/80)
        в”Ӯ
        в”ңв”ҖвҶ’ EMERGENCY? (>180/120 + symptoms)
        в”Ӯ         в”Ӯ
        в”Ӯ         в””в”ҖвҶ’ YES вҶ’ ER immediately
        в”Ӯ
        в”ңв”ҖвҶ’ Confirm with multiple readings
        в”Ӯ         в”Ӯ
        в”Ӯ         в””в”ҖвҶ’ White coat effect? вҶ’ Home monitoring
        в”Ӯ
        в”ңв”ҖвҶ’ SECONDARY CAUSES SCREEN
        в”Ӯ         в”Ӯ
        в”Ӯ         в”ңв”ҖвҶ’ Young (<30) or resistant HTN вҶ’ Full workup
        в”Ӯ         в”ңв”ҖвҶ’ Hypokalemia вҶ’ Aldosterone/Renin
        в”Ӯ         в”ңв”ҖвҶ’ Symptoms of apnea вҶ’ Sleep study
        в”Ӯ         в”ңв”ҖвҶ’ Cushingoid features вҶ’ Cortisol
        в”Ӯ         в”ңв”ҖвҶ’ Paroxysmal HTN вҶ’ Metanephrines
        в”Ӯ         в””в”ҖвҶ’ Renal bruit вҶ’ Renal doppler
        в”Ӯ
        в”ңв”ҖвҶ’ KIDNEY ASSESSMENT (ALL PATIENTS)
        в”Ӯ         в”Ӯ
        в”Ӯ         в”ңв”ҖвҶ’ eGFR, Creatinine, BUN
        в”Ӯ         в”ңв”ҖвҶ’ ACR (urine albumin-creatinine ratio)
        в”Ӯ         в”ңв”ҖвҶ’ Urinalysis
        в”Ӯ         в””в”ҖвҶ’ If abnormal вҶ’ Nephrology
        в”Ӯ
        в”ңв”ҖвҶ’ CARDIOVASCULAR RISK
        в”Ӯ         в”Ӯ
        в”Ӯ         в”ңв”ҖвҶ’ Lipids (ApoB, Lp(a))
        в”Ӯ         в”ңв”ҖвҶ’ hs-CRP, Homocysteine
        в”Ӯ         в”ңв”ҖвҶ’ Fasting insulin, HbA1c
        в”Ӯ         в”ңв”ҖвҶ’ ECG
        в”Ӯ         в””в”ҖвҶ’ CAC score if intermediate risk
        в”Ӯ
        в”ңв”ҖвҶ’ ROOT CAUSE APPROACH
        в”Ӯ         в”Ӯ
        в”Ӯ         в”ңв”ҖвҶ’ Insulin resistance present?
        в”Ӯ         в”Ӯ         в””в”ҖвҶ’ See 06_METABOLIC
        в”Ӯ         в”Ӯ
        в”Ӯ         в”ңв”ҖвҶ’ Stress/HPA dysfunction?
        в”Ӯ         в”Ӯ         в””в”ҖвҶ’ See 09_HPA_ADRENAL
        в”Ӯ         в”Ӯ
        в”Ӯ         в”ңв”ҖвҶ’ Sleep issues?
        в”Ӯ         в”Ӯ         в””в”ҖвҶ’ See 14_SLEEP
        в”Ӯ         в”Ӯ
        в”Ӯ         в””в”ҖвҶ’ Toxin exposure?
        в”Ӯ                   в””в”ҖвҶ’ See 13_DETOX (lead, cadmium)
        в”Ӯ
        в””в”ҖвҶ’ INTERVENTIONS
                  в”Ӯ
                  в”ңв”ҖвҶ’ Lifestyle FIRST (DASH, exercise, weight, stress)
                  в”ңв”ҖвҶ’ Supplements (Mg, CoQ10, beets, garlic)
                  в””в”ҖвҶ’ Medications if needed
```

## HYPERTENSION WORKUP

**Tier 1 (All patients):**
- BP monitoring (home, multiple readings)
- eGFR, Creatinine, BUN
- ACR (urine albumin-creatinine ratio)
- Urinalysis
- Basic metabolic panel
- Lipids, Fasting glucose/insulin, HbA1c
- ECG

**Tier 2 (If abnormal or resistant):**
- Echocardiogram
- Aldosterone/Renin ratio
- TSH
- Sleep study
- 24h ambulatory BP monitoring

**Tier 3 (Secondary HTN suspected):**
- Cortisol (AM, 24h urine, or DUTCH)
- Metanephrines (plasma or 24h urine)
- Renal artery doppler
- CT/MRI adrenals if indicated

## CORE PRINCIPLE

**Follow the evidence:**
1. Start with common causes
2. Test systematically
3. Treat what you find
4. Reassess and dig deeper if needed
5. Consider toxins/infections in refractory cases
